name: AREthSetProviderEndpoints
title: AREthSetProviderEndpoints
syntax: long AREthSetProviderEndpoints(dword csiHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort) // form 1
long AREthSetProviderEndpoints(dword csiHandle, byte remoteIPv6Address[], dword remoteUDPPort, dword remoteTCPPort) // form 2
long AREthSetProviderEndpoints(dword csiHandle, IP_Endpoint remoteIPEndpoint); // form 3
description: Sets the UDP and TCP endpoint that is used for the consumed service instance to reach the corresponding provided service instance.

parameters.name: csiHandle
parameters.description: Consumed service instance handle (may be retrieved by AREthGetConsumedObjectHandle).

parameters.name: remoteIPv4Address
parameters.description: IPv4 address of the provider. In network byte order.

parameters.name: remoteUDPPort
parameters.description: An UDP port number of the provider or zero if there is none.

parameters.name: remoteTCPPort
parameters.description: A TCP port number of the provider or zero if there is none.

parameters.name: remoteIPEndpoint
parameters.description: Object of type IP_Endpoint that contains the address/port of the provider. An IP_Endpoint with port number zero may be passed to delete a previously set IP_Endpoint.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
